purpose: WS5 non-emitter reference set for conformal calibration and FPR analysis
methodology: 18 manually curated locations spanning 5 European ecoregions and 8 CORINE Land Cover macro-classes. Selection: (i) no EDGAR/EUTL/GEM industrial CH4 point source within 20 km; (ii) minimum 60 km from confirmed CH4Net emitter detections (warn threshold); (iii) varied terrain for FPR characterisation by terrain class.
conformal_calibration_note: Run CH4Net v8 inference on S2 L1C scenes at these locations. Collect S/C ratios as the non-conformity score set for conformalized threshold calibration (WS1 conformal prediction module). Target: 90th percentile S/C on non-emitter set defines alpha=0.10 guaranteed FPR bound.

locations.label: Lüneburg Heath — heathland/moor
locations.exclusion_notes: Coordinate adjusted to tile T32UNE centre. Closest power plant: Moorburg (Hamburg, ~80 km N); decommissioned 2021.

locations.label: Belgian Ardennes — mixed forest
locations.exclusion_notes: No industrial CH4 sources within 50 km. Closest: Liège steel (55 km NE).

locations.label: Moselle Valley, Germany — arable/vineyard
locations.exclusion_notes: Moselle agricultural corridor; no heavy industry. ~120 km from Weisweiler.

locations.label: Hamburg rural lowlands, Germany — arable
locations.exclusion_notes: Schleswig lowland; closest emitter Groningen ~244 km W.

locations.label: Šumava NP interior, Czech Republic — coniferous forest
locations.exclusion_notes: Core zone Šumava NP; no industry within 200 km. Different crop from nonemit_007.

locations.label: Westerwald, Germany — mixed forest
locations.exclusion_notes: Westerwald uplands; ~86 km from Neurath (closest emitter).

locations.label: Bohemian Forest — coniferous
locations.exclusion_notes: Šumava / Bavarian Forest NP. Closest plant: Schwandorf (~60 km NW, shutdown).

locations.label: Franconian Highland, Germany — complex cultivation
locations.exclusion_notes: Bavarian/Franconian mosaic farmland; ~155 km from Lippendorf.

locations.label: Erzgebirge foothills, Germany — upland pasture
locations.exclusion_notes: Saxony upland; ~91 km SE of Lippendorf.

locations.label: NE Slovakia lowlands — arable
locations.exclusion_notes: Pannonian lowland; ~170 km S of Rybnik.

locations.label: Łódź region, central Poland — arable
locations.exclusion_notes: Central Poland flatlands; ~68 km N of Bełchatów.

locations.label: Slovak Highlands — broadleaved forest
locations.exclusion_notes: Malá Fatra mountains. Closest plant: Nováky (~30 km SW, coal; check separation).

locations.label: Mazovian lowland, Poland — broadleaved forest
locations.exclusion_notes: River-terrace broadleaved forest; ~98 km NW of Bełchatów.

locations.label: Schleswig-Holstein coastal plain — pasture
locations.exclusion_notes: North German coastal meadow; ~265 km E of Groningen.

locations.label: Swedish coastal plain — mixed forest
locations.exclusion_notes: Coordinate adjusted to tile T33UUB centre. Swedish coastal mixed farmland/forest. No industrial CH4 within 60 km.

locations.label: Baltic coast, Latvia — coastal grassland
locations.exclusion_notes: Coordinate adjusted to tile T35VLC centre. Gulf of Rīga coast; wetland/grassland. No industrial sources.

locations.label: Apennines, Italy — mixed forest
locations.exclusion_notes: Reggio Emilia Apennines. No emitters within 50 km. Po Valley ceramics industry is far.

locations.label: Tuscany coastal lowland, Italy — coastal wetland
locations.exclusion_notes: Versilia/Magra coastal zone; >600 km from all monitored emitters.

l1c_availability_note: 11 original locations used MGRS tiles that only have L2A in the CDSE online archive. Replacements use confirmed-L1C tiles (verified by successful downloads during site inference). All replacements maintain ecoregion and CLC class diversity; all >30 km from nearest emitter.
